name: hospitality managers in restaurants processing 5–15 schedules/week tool
description: For hospitality managers in restaurants processing 5–15 schedules/week, inefficient manual scheduling causes overtime errors and employee dissatisfaction. We automate shift scheduling instead of manual scheduling spreadsheets.
